text:
# In the Family Court	Case No: [Case number]

In the Family Court	Case No: [Case number]

sitting at [Court name]

IMPORTANT NOTICE TO THE RESPONDENT, [RESPONDENT NAME] OF [RESPONDENT ADDRESS]

YOU MUST OBEY THIS ORDER. You should read it carefully. If you do not understand anything in this order you should go to a solicitor, Legal Advice Centre or Citizens Advice Bureau. You have a right to apply to the court to change or cancel the order.

WARNING: IF, WITHOUT REASONABLE EXCUSE, YOU DO ANYTHING WHICH YOU ARE FORBIDDEN FROM DOING BY THIS ORDER, YOU WILL BE COMMITTING A CRIMINAL OFFENCE AND LIABLE ON CONVICTION TO A TERM OF IMPRISONMENT NOT EXCEEDING FIVE YEARS OR TO A FINE OR BOTH.

ALTERNATIVELY, IF YOU DISOBEY THIS ORDER, YOU MAY BE HELD TO BE IN CONTEMPT OF COURT AND MAY BE IMPRISONED, FINED, OR HAVE YOUR ASSETS SEIZED.

Before [name of judge] in private on [date] at a [type of hearing]

The parties:	The applicant [applicant name] [was] / [was not] present at the hearing

The applicant [was represented by [name] [of counsel] / [, a solicitor]] / [did not have a legal representative]

The respondent [respondent name] [was] / [was not] present at the hearing

The respondent [was represented by [name] [of counsel] / [, a solicitor]] / [did not have a legal representative]

[The court explained the terms of the order to the respondent.] / [The court was satisfied that the respondent understood the terms of the order.]

Definitions

Where this order says ‘the applicant’ it means [applicant name]

Where this order says ‘the respondent’ it means [respondent name]

Where this order says ‘the child/ren’ it means:

[child full name] (a [boy] / [girl]) born on [date]

[child full name] (a [boy] / [girl]) born on [date]

[The “family home” is the property at [full address] [and its surrounding gardens, land and outbuildings]]

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the Family Court	Case No: [Case number]
